name: Firefox

pricing.details: Free and open source. Optional paid Firefox Sync with Mozilla account.

description: General-purpose browser from Mozilla with strong extension ecosystem. Requires configuration hardening to reach meaningful privacy defaults. Ships with telemetry enabled by default.
rationale: Firefox's primary value is its extension support (uBlock Origin, etc.) and open-source codebase. Default telemetry settings and integration with Mozilla services (Pocket, Suggest) reduce privacy scores out-of-the-box. With appropriate configuration (arkenfox user.js or equivalent), Firefox becomes a competitive privacy browser. Maintained by a non-profit with a public interest mission.
